message:
Security Hardening: Enforce strict file permissions (0700/0600)

Comprehensive security audit and remediation of file permission modes across
the codebase to prevent unauthorized access in multi-user environments.

Key changes:
- Enforce 0700 (Owner-only) for all sensitive directories:
  - Repository initialization (.git) in internal/git/repo.go
  - Database directories in internal/db/db.go
  - Daemon socket directories in internal/daemon/daemon.go
  - Configuration directories in internal/config/loader.go
  - Log directories in internal/cli/run.go and emergency.go
  - Rollback and history directories in internal/git/history.go
  - Integration hook directories (.claude) in internal/integrations/claudehooks.go

- Enforce 0600 (Owner-only) for all sensitive files:
  - Database files (pre-creation) in internal/db/db.go
  - PID files in internal/daemon/daemon.go
  - Configuration files (init/loader)
  - Execution and emergency logs
  - History snapshots and rollback metadata
  - Integration configuration files (.cursorrules, hooks.json)

This standardizes the defense-in-depth posture of the application, ensuring
that secrets, logs, and internal state are not world-readable by default.
